workstreams.write_owner: ChatGPT conversation: Azure IaC MSP Lab — bounded remediation explicitly authorized by Anthony Edgar
workstreams.scope: Repository-only remediation of the six evidence-quality findings recorded against PR #32, plus design documentation and project-state reconciliation. Permitted paths: infra/recovery/collector-recovery-evidence-contract.json, infra/recovery/recovery_evidence_core.py, infra/recovery/validate_recovery_evidence.py, infra/tests/test_collector_recovery_evidence.py, docs/designs/collector-recovery-evidence-schemas.md, .project/active-work.json, and .project/handoffs/current-state.md. Protected paths: .github/workflows/**, infra/replacement/**, infra/modules/**, application source, credentials, live evidence, Azure mutation scripts, budgets, alerts, and deployed resources.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This remains the latest promoted Azure control-plane evidence. No live Azure connector was available for PR #34. It does not prove current tenant or subscription context, guest health, pricing, SKU availability, quota, actual cost, present-day deployment state, RBAC effectiveness, snapshot recoverability, or rollback.

pr32_exact_head.claim_boundary: CI proved repository consistency only. The evidence-quality review of the same head required changes.

pr34_last_exact_head.claim_boundary: This proves repository consistency for the exact remediation head before the final CI-evidence coordination update.

current_workstream.authority: Live GitHub checks are authoritative. Local tests and predecessor heads do not substitute for final exact-head CI.

ci_verification.claim_boundary: CI does not prove Azure snapshot recoverability, Trusted Launch bootability, rollback, guest health, current cost, quota, RBAC restoration, or execution authority.

pr32_evidence_quality.claim_boundary: PR #32 merge did not erase or resolve the exact-head review findings.

current_remediation.claim_boundary: No acceptance decision exists until the final coordination head passes CI and is inspected. The pull-request owner account cannot represent independent organizational approval.

conditions: fresh authenticated subscription-specific meter, SKU availability, and quota preflight before any execution
stop and obtain renewed cost approval if projected temporary cost exceeds CAD 4
unconditional stop if projected temporary cost exceeds CAD 10
cleanup owner and deadline must be approved before any temporary resource is created
azure_cost.claim_boundary: Planning feasibility only; this is not actual-cost evidence, a subscription-specific quotation, budget approval, or Azure execution authorization.

verification_criteria: authoritative v1 semantics are pinned against contract drift
every record type requires evidence-bearing details
redaction metadata exactly matches recursive marker paths
target resource IDs are distinct and share one subscription
supersession provenance is status-bound, identifies the replacement package, and cannot retain verified claims
fresh evidence-quality review examines the exact passing head
next_bounded_operation.failure_behavior: Keep PR #34 draft, inspect the exact failing job or review finding, patch only declared files, run fresh exact-head CI, and repeat review. Do not weaken evidence controls merely to obtain a passing result.
next_bounded_operation.rollback: Close PR #34 without merge or revert its repository commits. No Azure rollback applies because this increment performs no Azure mutation.
next_bounded_operation.next_gate: Wait for the final PR #34 coordination head to pass exact-head CI. Do not add live guest or Azure commands, authenticate to Azure, activate workflows, create snapshots, create rehearsal resources, alter delete options, restore RBAC, modify budgets or alerts, or claim operational recovery.
